title: 8 herbal essential oils for cough in asthma patients
description: Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils, also known as rosemary oil, is a natural remedy for cough relief. It contains properties such as camphor, bornyl acetate, and alpha-pinene, which have anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, helping to loosen mucus and reduce congestion. The constituents in rosemary oil also have antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help combat infections that may be causing the cough.
